channel.title: NextReach Studio
channel.description: Practical tools, guides, and resources for AI builders, Claude Code users, indie hackers, and full-stack developers building with LLMs.

item.title: LLM Context Window Management: When Your AI Forgets Everything
item.description: Practical strategies for managing context windows in long coding sessions. Covers token budgeting, context distillation, and tool call optimization.

item.title: Gemini CLI for Developers: Beyond the Basics
item.description: Advanced usage patterns for Gemini CLI in real development workflows. Covers context injection, pipe chaining, scripting, and integrating with existing toolchains.

item.title: Build Your First MCP Server in 30 Minutes: Claude Tool Integration
item.description: A hands-on tutorial for building a custom Model Context Protocol server. Works with Claude Desktop, Claude Code, and any MCP-compatible client.

item.title: Running Local LLMs on macOS with Ollama: A Complete Setup Guide
item.description: Step-by-step guide to running Llama 3/4, Mistral, Phi-3/4, and Gemma 3 locally on macOS using Ollama. Covers Apple Silicon performance, model selection, and API integration.

item.title: Claude Code Workflow: 15 Patterns That Actually Speed Up Development
item.description: Real workflow patterns for Claude Code users that save hours. Covers context management, AGENTS.md tricks, multi-file edits, slash commands.

item.title: Choosing the Right LLM for Your Coding Workflow in 2026
item.description: A practical comparison guide for developers choosing between Claude, Gemini, GPT-4o, Llama 3, and local models. Covers task fit, cost, context length, and real benchmark results.

item.title: AI API Cost Optimization: Reduce Your Bill by 60% Without Sacrificing Quality
item.description: Proven techniques for cutting LLM API costs including prompt caching, batching, model routing, and smarter context management. With real cost calculations.

item.title: The AI Developer Tools Stack: What Serious Builders Actually Use
item.description: A curated directory of tools, libraries, frameworks, and services that professional AI developers rely on. Organized by category with honest assessments.

item.title: LLM API Providers Directory: Every Major Provider Compared
item.description: A comprehensive directory of every LLM API provider as of 2026. Pricing, rate limits, context windows, strengths, and ideal use cases for each.
